MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk L. Fong, Not Reported (D501)

Appearances on WED-MAR-13-2013:
Plaintiff THE TIDES CENTER is represented by Justin McBride who is present with Attorney Michael S. Rossoff
Defendant VICTOR VASQUEZ is present with Attorney Catherine Danielson

Judge Pro Tem James Birkelund, litigants, and counsel confer in Dept. 502B for settlement discussions.

This case settles. The parties enter into an agreement which is signed and filed. The trial date of MAR-18-2013 is vacated.
